test_summary: Source inspection and regression tests confirm empty BaseRef defaults to HEAD before git worktree add, option-like refs are rejected before git worktree add, NUL/CR/LF are rejected as invalid single-ref input, unknown refs fail closed via git rev-parse --verify --quiet <base>^{commit}, and valid tag/ref commit-ish values are accepted. Focused test command passed after adding direct control-character coverage: go test ./internal/state -run 'TestEnsureDefaultWorktreeForChange(Rejects|Accepts|_Provisions)' -count=1.
notes: Codebase map relevance self-check: not relied on; the task is localized to internal/state/worktree.go and internal/state/worktree_test.go, and the required source/tests plus task acceptance fully determine the behavior. Control-character rejection is now covered by TestEnsureDefaultWorktreeForChangeRejectsInvalidBaseRefControlChars for NUL, carriage return, and line feed.
